revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
1 revision imported: : importing my programmatically created redirects, categories, and placeholders
Adding [[Category:bump 1-25]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Bump 1-25]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Category:Pages with blank templates" to "Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Removing from [[Category:New]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
revision.text:
<noinclude> </noinclude>
<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Egyptology/styles.css]] [[Category:Blank templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: undo edit ([[Special:Diff/3062394]])
revision.text:
<noinclude> </noinclude>
<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Egyptology/styles.css]] [[Category:Blank templates]] }}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "(?s)(\{\{Draft categories\|.*?\}\})" to "<noinclude>\n$1\n</noinclude>"
revision.text:
<noinclude> </noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n{{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Egyptology/styles.css]] [[Category:Blank templates]] }}\n</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Draft categories|" to "{{draft categories|"
revision.text:
<noinclude> </noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n{{draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Egyptology/styles.css]] [[Category:Blank templates]] }}\n</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
revision.text:
<noinclude> </noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Egyptology/styles.css]] [[Category:Blank templates]] }}</noinclude> \n</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Blank templates
revision.text:
<noinclude> </noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]] [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Egyptology/styles.css]]
}}</noinclude> \n</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Erroneous transclusions of Egyptology/styles.css
Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Egyptology%2Fstyles.css here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Egyptology%2Fstyles.css for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <noinclude> </noinclude>
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories|
}}</noinclude> \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
